description: Returns a paginated list of game events, optionally filtered by country and event type.

limit.description: Maximum number of events to return.

cursor.description: Pagination cursor returned by the previous response.

eventTypes.description: Filter by one or more event type strings.

output.description: Paginated list of event objects and a cursor for the next page.

fields.nextCursor: string|null — cursor for the next page, null when no more pages

notes: Event object fields: type (string), data (object, shape varies by event type), createdAt (ISO 8601 timestamp).
